title: CURE-OR++: Object Recognition Robustness Under Native CURE-OR Challenges and Digital Transfer Pipelines
description: CURE-OR++ is a compact benchmark package for auditing object-recognition robustness under native CURE-OR challenge conditions, documented real-transfer pipelines, and VLM prompt-pack evaluations. The public package contains project-authored code, configs, aggregate reports, generated figures, paper source, release documentation, and sanitized parsed-response summaries. It intentionally excludes raw CURE-OR images, local real-transfer image payloads, raw hosted-provider responses, provider caches, source dataset archives, and credentials.
notes: Raw CURE-OR and mini-CURE-OR images, local real-transfer image payloads, raw hosted-provider response JSONL files, provider API caches, source dataset archives, and credentials are not included in the public archive.
